Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce Python code constructing the Petri net Use pm4py library Provide places and transitions arcs initial and final marking Should include loops between DV and RDS FC and II

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: At the end of the process once the claim is paid a notification is sent and finally the claim is closed the process should reach the final marking

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Also include optional approval step if amount threshold But we can model as a transition that may or may not be taken

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We could model as a decision place after CA where token goes to either AP or directly to P depending on condition

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: But for simplicity we can just include AP always its fine

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets design Places start after CR after DV after RDS maybe same as after DV

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: But better Place between DV and RDS loop place doc verification before DV transition then RDS leads back to doc verification Similarly for FC II loop place fraud check before FC II leads back to fraud check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Transition DV consumes from p2 produces into p3 Transition RDS consumes from p3 produces into p2 loop Similarly for fraud check Transition FC consumes from p4 produce into p5 Transition II consumes from p5 produce into p4

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: After CA produce token in pre AP place which has two outgoing arcs one arc leads via AP transition then payment another arc leads directly via payment transition skipping approval

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thats fine because Petri nets allow nondeterministic choice based on tokens distribution which is okay for demonstration purposes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Implement as described above with simple structure ignoring conditional gating details beyond loops Define initial marking im start equals 1 Set final marking fm closure equals 1
